methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran-Israel military escalation dominates the window, with secondary diplomatic developments in Georgia and Syria.
bullets: US-Israeli attacks on Iran and Tehran's deployment of cluster warheads against Israeli defenses have sharply elevated cross-border escalation risks.
Trump's primetime address and explicit threats of a "Stone Age" retaliation have triggered Tehran's vow to respond, compounding diplomatic rupture.
Diplomatic pressure on Georgia regarding restrictive grant laws and Swiss visa mandates coincides with emergency humanitarian coordination in Syria.
